name: nmr_qc
description: Run 1H NMR on a synthesized batch using the lab's Bruker AVANCE NEO 400 MHz to confirm structural identity. Returns observed chemical shifts. Call this when hplc_qc returns passed_qc=false (impurity may be a regioisomer) or when plate_reader gives an unexpected result and you suspect the wrong compound was synthesized. Do NOT call this on every batch — only when there is a reason to doubt the synthesis.

expected_smiles.description: The SMILES of the compound you expected to synthesize.
